DAC_Error_Handling_Usability_01 (AAA)


Description

User Story
As a user completing a processing or catch certificate form,
I want all required field errors to be displayed when I submit the form using “Save and continue”,
So that I can clearly understand what information is missing and correct all errors efficiently before progressing.

Problem Description
On the “Add catch details” page, when the form is submitted with no data using the “Save and continue” button, only one validation error is presented in the error summary and on the page.

However, when the “Add” button beneath the input fields is selected, multiple validation errors appear, indicating that additional required fields were not validated when the form was submitted via “Save and continue”.

This inconsistent error behaviour causes confusion and makes it harder for users—particularly those using assistive technologies—to identify all required actions needed to progress.

Additionally, after activating “Save and continue”, keyboard and screen reader focus remains on the button, rather than moving to the error summary at the top of the page.

Affected Pages
URL:
https://fes-ext.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/create-processing-statement/GBR-2026-PS-7C1020E66/add-catch-details/GBR-2026-PS-7C1020E66-1772206438?pageNo=1 Page title: Error: Add catch details – Create a UK processing statement –  Journey: Journey 2, Step 7a

URL: https://fes-ext.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/create-catch-certificate/GBR-2026-CC-AB4CA989E/direct-landing Page title: Add your trip – Create a UK catch certificate – Welcome to GOV.UK  Journey: Journey 1, Step 13

Voice activation user feedback:

“I found when I leave this form completely blank and try to progress to the next page there is only one error picked up. I would have expected a full list of all errors. I found I must select the ‘Add’ button first for the page to refresh and then all the errors are displayed.”

Acceptance Criteria
When “Save and continue” is selected:

All required input fields are validated consistently

A complete list of validation errors is displayed in the error summary

Each error summary item includes a skip link to the relevant form field

Each affected field displays a clear, inline error message explaining what is required
